subcodes.title: Words following address to theosophists, spoken on 1913-04-10
subcodes.first_line: Our hearts like unto pure mirrors receive the impressions and these spiritual images are reflected from one mirror upon another without the medium of language.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the power of words; of speech, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @limits of language
